prs.title: Split apprunner config into prod and staging files
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Splitting a single AppRunner config into prod and staging files is a meaningful infra config change across 4 files but involves no novel logic.

prs.title: Jp/staging to apprunner
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small follow-up AppRunner config adjustment with gitattributes update and minor YAML changes across 3 files.

prs.title: Revert verbose logging for debugging
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Reverting a single-file verbose logging change is a trivial one-line or near-trivial rollback; Jason's commits are purely merge commits with no code contribution.

prs.title: Ch/sm 240 ai agent
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Major AI agent feature spanning 20 files including multiple sub-agents, post-response graphs, state management, a new API route, and UI hook/component updates representing significant architectural work.

prs.title: adds company role
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Adding a company role field touches schema, server action, and UI dialog across 4 files, with Jason contributing a meaningful enum rename/refactor on top of Chris's initial feature work.

prs.title: Rename user 'role' field to 'type' across codebase
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Renaming a user field across 12 files including schema, seed, multiple admin pages, session lib, and documentation is a meaningful cross-cutting refactor.

prs.title: improves competitive analysis
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Improving competitive analysis spans the AI agent, a complex slide component, and a streaming API route with meaningful logic changes across all three files; Jason's tool_calls fix is a non-trivial contribution.

prs.title: Add prod/staging AppRunner configs and update secrets
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Adding prod/staging AppRunner config files with secrets updates across 4 files is a solid infra config change but largely declarative YAML work.

prs.title: Jp/leads upload fix
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Fixing leads upload involves a new API route, a significant CSV upload dialog component rewrite, and three documentation/planning files capturing architectural decisions, totalling meaningful backend and UI effort.

prs.title: Adds verbose logging for debugging to gap assessor
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Adding verbose debug logging to a single assessor file is a small, targeted diagnostic change.

prs.title: small fix for pr 178
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: A 3-line fix to a single admin page is a trivial bug fix.

prs.title: create company with no users
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Enabling company creation without users touches 10 files spanning admin UI, actions, DAL, queue actions across multiple feature areas, and a data-fields collector — a significant cross-cutting feature.

prs.title: saves BTS as company field value
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Only 30 custom lines across 3 files saving BTS as a company field value is a small targeted feature addition once vendored/auto-gen lines are excluded.

prs.title: introduces automatic aws microsite generation
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Introducing automatic AWS microsite generation is a major new feature with a full prompt, streaming API route, new UI button and page integration, gap management component updates, and Docker config across 9 files.

prs.title: fixes slide styles
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: A 5-line style fix to a single slide component is a trivial UI tweak.

prs.title: sends lead csv as email
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Implements end-to-end lead CSV email delivery across three files — a server action, an email service integration, and a UI dialog component — representing a solid, self-contained feature.

prs.title: view company s3 files
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Builds out a significant admin feature spanning S3 service integration, file attachment actions, and multiple new UI components across five files with nearly 800 custom lines, constituting a meaningful new capability with backend and frontend complexity.

stories.name: Staging and Production Environment Separation
stories.rationale: Established separate AppRunner configurations for production and staging environments, including updated secrets management, enabling safer deployments and environment isolation.

stories.name: AI Agent Debugging and Gap Assessor Improvements
stories.rationale: Added and then reverted verbose logging to the gap assessor agent to support a targeted debugging session without leaving noise in production.

stories.name: New AI Agent for Business Readiness Analysis
stories.rationale: Introduced a major new AI agent to expand the platform's automated business readiness assessment capabilities.

stories.name: Competitive Analysis AI Enhancement
stories.rationale: Improved the competitive analysis AI agent to deliver higher-quality and more comprehensive competitive insights for businesses.

stories.name: Automatic Microsite Generation for Companies
stories.rationale: Introduced automated AWS-hosted microsite generation, allowing the platform to spin up company-specific microsites without manual intervention.

stories.name: Company Role and User Type Data Modelling
stories.rationale: Expanded the data model by adding company roles, renaming the user role field to type for clarity, and persisting business type scores as company field values.

stories.name: Lead Upload and Email Distribution Fix
stories.rationale: Fixed the leads CSV upload flow and added the ability to send lead CSVs via email, improving the reliability and reach of lead management workflows.

stories.name: Company Administration and S3 File Management
stories.rationale: Enabled creation of companies without requiring users upfront and added an admin interface to view company-associated S3 files, streamlining internal company management.

stories.name: Presentation Slide Style Fix
stories.rationale: Corrected slide styling issues to ensure consistent and polished presentation of business readiness content.
